description: Base plate with four M6 threaded mounting holes and a clearance-hole cover plate stacked above it.

parts.name: base_plate
parts.instruction_text: Create a 12 mm thick 3D model from this 2D drawing. Make the corner holes M6 threaded 10 mm deep. Make the largest pocket 4 mm deep. Raise the center island by 2 mm. Add 1 mm chamfers.

parts.name: cover_plate
parts.instruction_text: Create an 8 mm thick 3D model from this 2D drawing. Cut the largest window through. Make the top slot through. Make the corner holes M6 clearance holes. Add 0.75 mm chamfers.
